name: noos-shuttle
description: NOOS Shuttle packages AI conversations into agent-ready handoff threads.

scripts.hub:build: npm run hub:web:build && cargo build --manifest-path apps/noos-hub/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.hub:run: npm run hub:web:build && cargo run --manifest-path apps/noos-hub/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
